task_completion.description: Log in to the Vicidial Admin interface.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Vicidial Admin login screen being filled with credentials (User: 6666) or the Vicidial Administration dashboard successfully loaded in a web browser.

task_completion.description: Open and read the new_areacodes.csv file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the file ~/Documents/VicidialData/new_areacodes.csv open in a text editor, spreadsheet application, or printed in the terminal, displaying the area code data.

task_completion.description: Add area code 324 for Florida (Jacksonville Overlay).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Vicidial Admin 'Add A New Phone Code' form filled out with Area Code: 324, Country Code: 1, GMT Offset: -5.00, DST: Y, State: FL, and Description: Jacksonville Overlay, or a system success message confirming area code 324 was added.

task_completion.description: Add area code 729 for Tennessee (Chattanooga Overlay).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Vicidial Admin 'Add A New Phone Code' form filled out with Area Code: 729, Country Code: 1, GMT Offset: -5.00, DST: Y, State: TN, and Description: Chattanooga Overlay, or a system success message confirming area code 729 was added.

task_completion.description: Add area code 839 for South Carolina (Columbia Overlay).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the Vicidial Admin 'Add A New Phone Code' form filled out with Area Code: 839, Country Code: 1, GMT Offset: -5.00, DST: Y, State: SC, and Description: Columbia Overlay, or a system success message confirming area code 839 was added.

integrity.description: Agent interacted with the Vicidial web GUI to add the codes.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen navigating the web browser interface for Vicidial Admin rather than executing direct SQL database insertions or backend scripts.

integrity.description: Agent genuinely entered the data into the forms.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the form fields being actively filled out or submitted, rather than the agent modifying local HTML to fake a success screen.

integrity.description: Agent used the exact data from the CSV file.
integrity.visual_evidence: The values entered into the web forms match the expected privileged information exactly, without the agent guessing or hallucinating time zones or descriptions.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected area codes to be added are 324, 729, and 839. For 324: Country Code=1, GMT Offset=-5.00, DST=Y, State=FL, Description='Jacksonville Overlay'. For 729: Country Code=1, GMT Offset=-5.00, DST=Y, State=TN, Description='Chattanooga Overlay'. For 839: Country Code=1, GMT Offset=-5.00, DST=Y, State=SC, Description='Columbia Overlay'.
